name: agent.go
summary: Agent 核心结构体定义，包含 client、tools、session、gate、sink、compact、memory 等所有字段

name: run.go
summary: Agent 核心循环 Run()，处理用户输入→LLM 调用→工具分发→流式输出

name: tools.go
summary: 工具注册/筛选/定义：RegisterTool/RegisterTools/RegisterMCPTools/availableTools/toolDefinitions

name: gate.go
summary: 权限门 Gate 接口：ConfirmHighRiskGate/ReadOnlyGate/AllowAllGate，决定工具调用是否放行

name: sink.go
summary: 事件驱动输出：Event/EventKind/Sink 接口，ConsoleSink/JSONSink/TestSink

name: plan.go
summary: 规划/反思/重规划：Step/Plan 结构体，GeneratePlan/ReviewPlan/Reflect/RePlan

name: compact.go
summary: 上下文压缩：maybeCompact/llmSummarize/pruneStaleToolResults，95%窗口触发自动压缩

name: deepseek.go
summary: DeepSeek V4 专用传输层：bodyFieldInjector 注入 thinking 参数，支持 DEEPSEEK_THINKING 环境变量

name: skill.go (agent)
summary: Skill 应用：ApplySkill/ClearSkill/formatSkillSystemPrompt，切换人格和工具白名单

name: ask.go
summary: Ask 工具：当用户请求有多个合理方案时，列出选项让用户选择

name: input.go
summary: 统一输入流：stdin/ReadLine/confirm，Ctrl+C 协作式中断处理

name: session.go
summary: 会话状态：Session 结构体，Add/Messages/BuildRequest/Trim/Snapshot/Restore

name: checkpoint.go
summary: 检查点持久化：SaveCheckpoint/RestoreFromCheckpoint，协调 Session 与 event.Store

name: hooks.go
summary: 工具 Hook：ToolHook 接口，BeforeToolCall/AfterToolCall 扩展点

name: helpers.go
summary: 杂项工具：recordEvent/truncate

name: prompt.go
summary: Prompt 模板引擎：LoadPrompt/LoadRawPrompt，XML 格式模板 + Go template 变量替换

name: cache_shape.go
summary: 前缀缓存形状计算：PrefixShape/CacheDiagnostics，SHA256 哈希 system/tools/prefix

name: execution_state.go
summary: 执行状态快照：ExecutionState 结构体，Save/Load/Resume Plan 执行

name: prune.go
summary: 陈旧 tool 结果裁剪：PruneStaleToolResults，保护尾段之外用占位符替换

name: install_tools.go
summary: install_skill 工具：从 JSON/Markdown/路径/URL 安装 Skill 人格

name: long_memory.go
summary: 长期记忆：Memory/MemoryStore 结构体，remember_rule 工具实现偏好/规则持久化

name: memory_cache.go
summary: QiuQiu 规则文件管理：QiuqiuRuleFile/EnsureQiuqiuRuleFiles/EmbedRuleFiles，嵌入模板生成

name: usage.go
summary: Token 用量追踪：TokenUsage/Pricing 结构体，累计 LLM 调用真实用量

name: storm_test.go
summary: Storm Breaker 风暴检测测试：循环检测、输出指纹检测、失败循环检测
